view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a simple online booking page is satisfied as evidenced by the successful booking process.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a simple online booking page is satisfied as evidenced by the successful booking process.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step to validate the requirement of a 'Simple online booking page' is supported by the successful completion of prior steps, particularly the 'customer-book-primary' step, which confirms that a customer can book an appointment through the system. The linked use case explicitly states the need for a simple online booking page, and the evidence shows that clients can see available slots, select a time, and complete the booking process, thus confirming the requirement is met.
